songs.title: When I Come Around
feed: “When I Come Around” by Green Day reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“When I Come Around” by Green Day reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 19 spots to #1.
“When I Come Around” by Green Day climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 19 spots to #1.
“When I Come Around” by Green Day is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 111 sales units.
“When I Come Around” by Green Day is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 185 streams units.
“When I Come Around” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 285,600 total units.

“Hitchin' a Ride” by Green Day is the biggest position gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 84 spots to #2.
